zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lister II於1495年出生在英國越可爾吉斯本時，他的父親Thomas Lister I32歲，母親Isabel de Cliderow31歲。他和Effamia Lucy de Westby至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1540年在他的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Lister II于1495年出生在英国越可爾吉斯本时，他的父亲Thomas Lister I32岁，母亲Isabel de Cliderow31岁。他和Effamia Lucy de Westby至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1540年在他的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lister II was born in 1495, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas Lister I, was 32 and his mother, Isabel de Cliderow, was 31. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Effamia Lucy de Westby. He died in 1540, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lister II est né en 1495, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Lister I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Cliderow, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Effamia Lucy de Westby. Il est décédé en 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Lister II 1495 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Lister I 32 und seine Mutter Isabel de Cliderow 31. Er hatte mit Effamia Lucy de Westby mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1540 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lister II è nato il nel 1495 nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Lister I, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Cliderow, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Effamia Lucy de Westby. Morì nel 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Lister IIが1495年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンで生まれた時，父Thomas Lister Iは32歳，母Isabel de Cliderowは31歳であった。彼はEffamia Lucy de Westbyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1540年に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lister II(이)가 1495년 영국 요르크실르 지스번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Lister I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Cliderow(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Effamia Lucy de Westby(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lister II nasceu em 1495, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Lister I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Cliderow, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Effamia Lucy de Westby. Ele faleceu em 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lister II родился в 1495 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Lister I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Cliderow, 31. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Effamia Lucy de Westby. Он умер в 1540 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Lister II nació en 1495, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Lister I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel de Cliderow, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Effamia Lucy de Westby. Murió en 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años.
